scripts.dev: concurrently -n "UI,ALERTS,AI,CONFIG" -c "magenta,cyan,blue,yellow" "npm run dev:ui" "npm run dev:alert-ingestion" "npm run dev:ai-engine" "npm run dev:config-manager"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix ui && npm install --prefix apps/alert-ingestion && npm install --prefix apps/ai-engine && npm install --prefix apps/config-manager
